news.headline: XREAL's new AR glasses receive TÜV Rheinland's Eye Comfort (5 Star) & High Visibility certificates in Shanghai, Dec. 5, 2024.
news.summary: In Shanghai on December 5, 2024, TÜV Rheinland Greater China, a global independent third-party entity specializing in testing, inspection, and certification, granted certifications such as Eye Comfort (5 Star), High Visibility, Color Accuracy, Low Blue Light, and Flicker Free to the latest product.

news.headline: Voting rights conference scheduled for November 2024.
Stocks to watch on Thursday: Dollar General expects 94 cents per share earnings on $10.15 billion revenue, Five Below reports better-than-expected results in Q3.
news.summary: Today, U.S. stock futures are showing a mixed trend. Investors are likely to keep an eye on certain stocks, such as Dollar General Corporation (DG) as it is expected to announce earnings of 94 cents per share on revenue of $10.15 billion. In after-hours trading, Dollar General shares saw a 2.8% increase, reaching $81.70. Additionally, Five Below, Inc. (FIVE) reported promising third-quarter results surpassing expectations. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Dollar General to release Q3 earnings; Expected EPS of 94 cents, revenue $10.14 billion, shares closed at $79.50.
news.summary: Dollar General Corporation (NYSE:DG) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings before the market opens on Thursday, Dec. 5. Analysts are predicting earnings of 94 cents per share for this quarter, a decrease from $1.26 per share reported during the same period last year. The company, based in Goodlettsville, Tennessee, is expected to disclose quarterly revenue of $10.14 billion, up from $9.69 billion a year ago based on data from Benzinga Pro. In the second quarter, Dollar General fell short of analyst expectations reporting earnings per share of $1.70, missing the consensus of $1.78. Quarterly sales were $10.21 billion, a 4.2% increase from the previous year but slightly below the street's forecast of $10.368 billion. Dollar General's shares saw a 0.6% increase, closing at $79.50 on Wednesday. For more details, visit Benzinga.com. Access the latest analyst ratings on the Analyst Stock Ratings page.

New on BitMEX: 1000000MOGUSDT and BRETTUSDT swaps now available with up to 50x leverage for MOG and BRETT.
news.summary: BitMEX recently introduced two new perpetual swaps, 1000000MOGUSDT and BRETTUSDT, allowing traders to access up to 50x leverage. The listings provide users with the opportunity to go long or short on MOG and BRETT.

news.headline: India's rise in Web3 driven by 1,000 startups, global funds, strong talent. Set to lead Web3 adoption by 2027.
news.summary: By the year 2027, India is projected to be at the forefront of Web3 adoption. This advancement will be spearheaded by a collaboration of startups, developers, and government-supported blockchain endeavors. This surge in Web3 adoption signifies a major milestone for India's tech landscape, with numbers indicating substantial growth in the field.

news.headline: Ipsos declines to make an offer to acquire Kantar Media.
BioArctic AB dosed first patient in Phase 2a study for Parkinson's disease with exidavnemab; Nasdaq Stockholm: BIOA B.
news.summary: Today, BioArctic AB (publ), a company listed on Nasdaq Stockholm under the ticker BIOA B, revealed that the initial patient in the EXIST Phase 2a trial for Parkinson's disease has received a dose of exidavnemab. This drug is a monoclonal antibody specifically created to address aggregated proteins in the brain, a common feature of neurodegenerative diseases. This development marks a significant step in the study, demonstrating progress in utilizing innovative treatments for conditions like Parkinson's disease.

news.headline: EQT launches Transition Infrastructure strategy, acquires ju:niz Energy, leveraging 15 years of experience in energy transition.
news.summary: EQT Transition Infrastructure, drawing from EQT's extensive expertise in supporting climate-related investments over the past 15 years, will focus on developing energy transition-related infrastructure projects. This initiative will offer funding and access to industrial and technological resources to further these efforts.

news.headline: Equinor and Shell merging UK assets to form largest independent oil & gas producer in North Sea, ensuring energy security.
news.summary: Equinor UK Ltd, a subsidiary of Equinor ASA, and Shell UK Limited, a subsidiary of Shell plc, are joining forces to create a new company that will become the largest independent producer in the UK North Sea. This joint venture, to be established as an incorporated entity, aims to support the UK's oil and gas production while enhancing energy security. Equinor ASA is listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange (EQNR) and New York Stock Exchange (EQNR), while Shell plc is listed on the London Stock Exchange (SHEL), New York Stock Exchange (ADR SHEL), and AMS Euronext (SHELL). This collaboration will bring together significant offshore assets and expertise from both companies.

news.headline: Skanska to host Capital Markets Day on Nov 18, 2025, in Seattle, WA. Details to follow closer to the event.
news.summary: A global company Skanska has announced its Capital Markets Day set to take place on November 18, 2025, in Seattle, Washington. The event invites investors, analysts, and financial media to participate. More details, including registration information, will be released closer to the event. This presents a valuable opportunity for attendees to gain insights into the company's strategies and prospects.

news.headline: Saudi COP16 Presidency urges private sector to boost funding in land restoration finance as thematic days begin at UNCCD COP16.
news.summary: The UNCCD COP16 in Riyadh began Land Day as part of its thematic days on Dec 5, 2024. The event is hosted by Saudi Arabia as the current UNCCD Presidency. Land Day is the first of seven thematic days aiming to concentrate discussions and negotiations on important topics within the conference.

news.headline: China Foreign Ministry: Some of the firms under sanctions include Teledyne Brown Engineering, Brinc Drones and Shield AI.
CRA and Netmore Group collaborate for LoRaWAN services in Czech Republic, enhancing IoT connectivity.
news.summary: In Stockholm, Netmore Group, a prominent LoRaWAN network operator, revealed that CRA, the biggest Czech cloud service provider, has opted for Netmore's Operator Platform-as-a-Service (PaaS) to enhance the provision of commercial Internet of Things (IoT) services. This move aims to modernize and streamline IoT services for customers. With Netmore PaaS, CRA can offer reliable and sustainable LoRaWAN network connectivity, while also improving network monitoring capabilities.

FunnyFuzzy partners with Best Friends Animal Society to support animal welfare with a donation program starting Nov. 20, 2024.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China, on December 5, 2024, FunnyFuzzy announced a partnership with Best Friends Animal Society® to support animal welfare through a new donation program starting on November 20, 2024. FunnyFuzzy aims to enhance the connection between people and their pets while raising awareness about the critical issues surrounding this cause. The collaboration is set to make a significant impact with its focus on promoting the well-being of animals.

news.headline: Coinbase aims to expand in Southeast Asia by supporting baht, peso stablecoins, targeting developers in Thailand and the Philippines.
news.summary: Coinbase Global Inc. (NASDAQ:COIN) is focusing on expanding in Southeast Asia by launching stablecoin initiatives in Thailand and the Philippines, as the cryptocurrency markets surge to record levels with the anticipation of a more supportive U.S. administration towards crypto. Jesse Pollak, the founder of Base and head of Coinbase Wallet, highlighted the importance of local currency stablecoins for wider blockchain adoption in Southeast Asia. Although Coinbase Exchange is not currently entering these markets, the company's wallet business and Base blockchain platform are engaging with developers in Thailand and the Philippines to establish infrastructure that facilitates the use of baht and peso stablecoins. Integrating local currencies "onchain" addresses several existing issues and paves the way for increased adoption in the region.

news.headline: Swiss Unemployment Rate Adjusted Actual 2.6% (Forecast 2.7%, Previous 2.6%)
Swiss Unemployment Rate Unadjusted Actual 2.6% (Forecast 2.7%, Previous 2.5%)
Binance rolls out promo for EOS Locked Products with up to 29.9% APR from Dec 5, 2024, to Jan 5, 2025.
news.summary: A new promotion has been launched by Binance for EOS (EOS) Locked Products, providing a maximum Annual Percentage Rate (APR) of 29.9%. This promotion is valid from December 5, 2024, to January 5, 2025.

news.headline: The 136th Canton Fair extends online platform beyond event with year-round access for global digital trade.
news.summary: In Guangzhou, China, the 136th China Import and Export Fair (known as the Canton Fair) recently wrapped up its one-month tradeshow on Dec. 5, 2024. The fair has decided to transform its online exhibition platform into a year-round event to provide continuous support for highly efficient trade operations. This initiative aims to boost commerce and networking opportunities beyond the traditional timeframe of the physical fair. The decision reflects the fair's commitment to adapting to the evolving needs of the market and promoting global trade.

news.headline: 2024 China-Africa Think Tanks Energy Forum held in Chad with 70+ experts exploring energy cooperation pathways.
news.summary: The 2024 China-Africa Think Tanks Energy Forum recently commenced in N'Djamena, Chad, aiming to enhance energy cooperation between the two regions. Attended by more than 70 experts and scholars from China, Chad, Kenya, Nigeria, South Africa, and other nations, the event focuses on modernizing energy pathways. Discussions encompass strategies to bolster collaboration in various energy sectors.

news.headline: Global Industrial Refrigeration Equipment Market is projected to reach USD 70.05 billion by 2033, growing at a CAGR of 5.21%.
news.summary: The Industrial Refrigeration Equipment Market was valued at around USD 42.23 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach USD 44.35 billion in 2024, with an expected value of approximately USD 70.05 billion by 2033, at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of about 5.21% during the forecast period 2024 to 2033. The market is driven by factors such as the increasing demand for efficient cooling solutions, rising demand for frozen and processed foods, technological advancements, expansion of cold chain logistics, growth in pharmaceutical and biotechnology sectors, health and safety regulations, urbanization, industrial growth, and increasing disposable incomes. Key segments include type, application, capacity, end-user industry, and region. Major players in this market include Hillphoenix Industrial, Daikin, Emerson, and Mitsubishi Heavy Industries Thermal Systems, Ltd, among others. In March 2024, Hillphoenix Industrial partnered with Cool Refrigeration Systems & Solutions, while Daikin unveiled a new transport refrigeration lineup in November 2023. Emerson introduced a modular refrigeration unit in October 2023, and Mitsubishi Heavy Industries launched the TEJ35GAM in September 2023. The report provides detailed insights, statistical data, competitive analysis, and forecasts for the global industrial refrigeration equipment market.

news.headline: VALNEVA's shares and voting rights announced on November 30, 2024.
SPIE to acquire 100% of Corporate Software AG in Switzerland - Cergy, December 5th, 2024.
news.summary: On December 5th, 2024, SPIE, a leading European company specializing in multi-technical services related to energy and communications, has revealed its plans to acquire the entirety of Corporate Software AG based in Switzerland. This acquisition marks a significant move for SPIE as they take over full ownership of Corporate Software AG's operations and assets in Switzerland.

news.headline: Vakhshouri: Trump's impact on oil market remains uncertain; prices fluctuating.
Tomas Daga, Lawyer key to Grifols Group’s success and failure
news.summary: A large international corporation has announced plans to invest $1 billion in building a new manufacturing plant in a developing country. This investment is expected to create around 5,000 new jobs in the local community. The plant is set to be operational within the next 18 months and will focus on producing electronics and consumer goods for export to markets around the world. This move is seen as a major boost for the country's economy and is anticipated to drive further growth and development in the region. The corporation cited the country's skilled labor force and favorable business environment as key factors in their decision to make this significant investment.

news.headline: Korea Zinc experiences unprecedented growth, reaching new record highs amid global market surge.
Federal Reserve's Christopher Waller hints at December rate cut, predicts inflation down to 2%. Mentions 75 basis points cut since September.
news.summary: Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller hinted at supporting an interest rate reduction during the upcoming December meeting due to concerns raised by recent inflation data exceeding the Fed's 2% target. Speaking at a conference in Washington, D.C., Waller mentioned that despite 75 basis points of cuts since September, monetary policy remains tight. He anticipates further rate cuts until achieving a more neutral policy stance in the coming year. Based on current economic data and forecasts indicating a decline in inflation towards 2% in the medium term, Waller leans towards backing a rate cut at the December meeting.

news.headline: Hafnia Limited declares USD 0.3790 dividend on Oslo Stock Exchange for Q3 2024; shares trade ex-dividend.
news.summary: Hafnia Limited ("Hafnia" or the "Company"), with OSE ticker code "HAFNI" and NYSE ticker code "HAFN", announced key details related to the third quarter 2024 dividend on November 27, 2024. The Company's shares will go ex-dividend on the Oslo Stock Exchange starting December 5, 2024, and on the New York Stock Exchange from December 6, 2024. Hafnia Limited is a global player in the industry.

news.headline: South Korean opposition leader predicts challenge in removing Yoon from office.
ONERugged's smart factory in SHENZHEN, China uses AI-driven automation, revolutionizing rugged computer manufacturing. #AIinManufacturing
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China, ONERugged's smart factory is at the forefront of smart manufacturing, utilizing AI-driven automation and advanced manufacturing technologies. This innovative approach is setting new standards in the industry, showcasing the power of AI in manufacturing.

news.headline: MBK Partners denies allegations by Korea Zinc about NDA breach in an investment, stating no relation to prior review.
news.summary: A statement from MBK Partners in Seoul, South Korea, refutes unfounded claims by Korea Zinc about a breach of a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA). MBK Partners Buyout Division, involved in a tender offer for Korea Zinc, asserts no connection between this current participation and a past investment review at Korea Zinc. Despite previous clarifications, Korea Zinc has raised concerns citing NDA terms. MBK Partners stands firm against these allegations.

BlackRock's IBIT reaches $50B swiftly with Bitcoin crossing $100K, highlighting growing institutional interest in cryptocurrency.
news.summary: The increasing demand for cryptocurrency as a high-quality investment option is evidenced by the strong performance of BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF. This suggests a growing interest among institutional investors in the crypto market.

news.headline: GigaDevice GD25/55 SPI NOR Flash Automotive-Grade Family now ISO 26262 ASIL D certified by SGS, ensuring safety & reliability.
news.summary: In Beijing, GigaDevice, a prominent semiconductor company known for Flash Memory, 32-bit Microcontrollers (MCUs), Sensors, and Analog products, has unveiled that its GD25/55 SPI NOR Flash Automotive-Grade Product Family has obtained the ISO 26262:2018 ASIL D Automotive Functional Safety certification from SGS. SGS is a renowned global company specializing in Testing, Inspection, and Certification services. This certification signifies that the product line has demonstrated exceptional safety attributes and dependability, enhancing its credibility in the automotive sector.

news.headline: BOJ's Nakamura: December Meeting Decision Pending
Soka Gakkai International to assist Nobel Peace Prize Forum in Oslo on Dec 11 after awarding Nihon Hidankyo on Dec 10.
news.summary: In Tokyo on December 5, 2024, it was announced that after the Nobel Peace Prize ceremony held on December 10 to honor Nihon Hidankyo, the Nobel Peace Prize Forum is scheduled for December 11 at the Oslo University Aula. The event, co-organized by the Norwegian Nobel Institute, will have increased participation this year and is also being partially sponsored by other entities.

news.headline: Montran implements Central Securities Depository system at Central Bank of Kosovo, enhancing management of dematerialized assets.
news.summary: Montran recently disclosed the completion of the implementation of its advanced Central Securities Depository (CSD) system at the Central Bank of Kosovo. The new technology integrates the efficient management of dematerialized assets in Kosovo. The successful deployment further underscores Montran's commitment to enhancing financial infrastructure globally.
